February 24, 2026 · Issue #1

The Claw Drop #1 — Welcome to the Machine

First issue! What OpenClaw is, why we built it, and 3 automations you can steal today.

Welcome to The Claw Drop 🪝

You're reading the very first issue of The Claw Drop — a weekly newsletter about building real automations with OpenClaw.

Every week we'll send you:

  • One blueprint — a step-by-step guide you can copy
  • Community builds — what other people are shipping
  • Tips & tricks — shortcuts we've discovered

This Week's Featured Builds

1. Morning Briefing Bot

Wake up to a Telegram message with your calendar, weather, and top emails. Takes 10 minutes to set up.

2. Auto-Reply to Twitter DMs

Screen incoming DMs and auto-reply to common questions while you sleep.

3. Google Sheets → Invoice Pipeline

Turn a spreadsheet row into a formatted PDF invoice, emailed to the client.

Until Next Time

That's it for issue #1. Hit reply if you build something cool — we might feature it next week.

— The Claw Drop Team

Never miss an issue. Subscribe to The Claw Drop.
